intro: Orfilea neraudiana, also known as Guaco or Orfilea, is a plant species native to Central and South America, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with health benefits including its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The bioactive constituents of Orfilea neraudiana include saponins, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties.
